name: secure-file-manager
description: Intelligent Secure File Manager with Adaptive Steganography

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w frontend" "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w worker"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w worker
